name: topdown_shooter
description_pt: Template de jogo de tiro com visao superior. Jogador move livremente, mira e atira em inimigos. Suporta bullet hell, survivors-like e twin-stick.
description_en: Top-down shooter template. Player moves freely, aims and shoots enemies. Supports bullet hell, survivors-like and twin-stick.
core_loop: Mover → Mirar → Atirar → Desviar → Coletar drops → Sobreviver

scene_structure.game: Arena + Player + Spawner + HUD (vida, pontuacao, wave)
scene_structure.upgrade: Tela de escolha de upgrade entre ondas
